name: CLX - MGA Insurance Review Video Generator v1

nodes.name: Webhook
nodes.notes: DEACTIVATED. Internal-call. Triggered by review-scheduler (B5.1) and triggered-event (B5.2). Looks up matching video_review_templates by trigger_signal_type, personalizes script via Claude, then chains existing video pipeline (clx-video-script-generator-v1 from commit 25c0886). Updates policy_reviews.video_render_id when chain returns. Body { skip: true } no-ops.

parameters.url: ={{ (() => { const rows = $input.item.json; const r = (Array.isArray(rows) ? rows[0] : rows) || {}; const trigger = r.trigger_signal_type || 'annual_review_due'; return 'https://zqwatouqmqgkmaslydbr.supabase.co/rest/v1/video_review_templates?vertical_id=eq.insurance&trigger_event=eq.' + encodeURIComponent(trigger) + '&active=eq.true&select=*&limit=1'; })() }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ (() => { const ctx = $('Build Claude Prompt').item.json; const resp = $input.item.json || {}; let script = ''; try { script = (resp.content && resp.content[0] && resp.content[0].text) || ''; } catch (e) {} return JSON.stringify({ internal_secret: $env.INTERNAL_EMAIL_SECRET, lead_id: ctx.lead_id, client_id: ctx.client_id, intent: 'book_meeting', script_override: script.trim() || null }); })() }}

nodes.name: Call Existing Video Pipeline
nodes.notes: Chains into commit 25c0886 video pipeline. The script-generator workflow accepts script_override (additive — Phase 5b ensures it; current MVP it falls back to its own Claude generation if script_override not honored).

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ (() => { const resp = $input.item.json || {}; const vrId = (resp && resp.video_render_id) || null; return JSON.stringify({ video_render_id: vrId, video_engagement_status: vrId ? 'not_sent' : 'not_sent' }); })() }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ vertical_id: 'insurance', event_type: 'review_video_requested', client_id: $('Build Claude Prompt').item.json.client_id, performed_by_user_id: null, performed_by_role: 'agent', event_data: { policy_review_id: $('Build Claude Prompt').item.json.review_id, trigger_event: $('Carry Both').item.json.template.trigger_event }, occurred_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, vertical_id: 'insurance', policy_review_id: $('Build Claude Prompt').item.json.review_id, status: 'video_requested' }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, skipped: true, reason: $json.error || $json._skipped ? 'skip' : 'no template or review' }) }}
